recent: 有效的学习依赖重复和反思。	Effective learning depends on repetition and reflection.
Learning is more effective when mistakes are reviewed in time.	及时复盘错误时，学习会更有效。
From my perspective, effective learning requires both effort and reflection.	在我看来，高效学习既需要努力，也需要反思。
Compared with passive input, active output leaves a deeper impression.	与被动输入相比，主动输出会留下更深的印象。
More importantly, a clear plan helps us use limited time wisely.	更重要的是，清晰的计划能帮助我们更明智地利用有限时间。
Translation requires understanding before expression.	翻译要求先理解，再表达。
